task_completion.visual_evidence: The GIMP application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The target color photograph is loaded into GIMP
task_completion.visual_evidence: A color photograph (or synthetic geometric fallback image) is visible in the main GIMP canvas.

task_completion.description: The Emboss filter dialog is opened
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Emboss' dialog window is visible, showing parameters like Azimuth, Elevation, and Depth.

task_completion.description: The image exhibits a grayscale relief effect
task_completion.visual_evidence: The image (either in the canvas or a preview window) has been transformed to look like a 3D grayscale relief with emphasized edges, bumps, and hollows.

task_completion.description: The Emboss effect is finalized on the main canvas
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Emboss dialog is closed and the main GIMP canvas shows the final grayscale relief image.

integrity.description: The agent used the GIMP GUI rather than terminal commands
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through GIMP menus (Filters -> Distorts -> Emboss) rather than executing ImageMagick or other CLI commands in a terminal.

integrity.description: The effect is a true emboss, not just desaturation
integrity.visual_evidence: The resulting image must have a 3D, carved appearance with directional lighting (bumps and hollows), not merely a flat black-and-white or grayscale version of the original photo.

integrity.description: The agent did not load a pre-edited image
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the original color image being loaded first, followed by the application of the filter, rather than opening an already-embossed image file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct filter is located in GIMP at Filters → Distorts → Emboss. The filter dialog contains Azimuth, Elevation, and Depth parameters. The Emboss filter inherently transforms a color photograph into a grayscale relief appearance with emphasized edges and a 3D carved effect (bright areas raised, dark ones carved).
